feed.title: Docket updates for Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
feed.rights: Created for the public domain by Free Law Project

entry.title: Entry #40 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Request for Judicial Notice re 39 MOTION to Dismiss Plaintiffs Nicholas Farrell and Jeff Ganan's Complaints filed byLinkedIn Corporation. (Attachments: # 1 Declaration of Natalie Peelish in Support of Defendant LinkedIn's Request for Incorporation by Reference and/or Judicial Notice, # 2 Exhibit 1 - BrowserGate Website, # 3 Exhibit 2 - LinkedIn User Agreement, # 4 Exhibit 3 - LinkedIn Privacy Policy, # 5 Exhibit 4 - LinkedIn Cookie Policy, # 6 Exhibit 5 - Teamfluence Webpage, # 7 Exhibit 6 - Fairlinked Homepage, # 8 Exhibit 7 - PordaAI, Chrome Web Store, # 9 Exhibit 8 - Anti-woke, Chrome Web Store, # 10 Exhibit 9 - Certified Translation of Prelim. March 11, 2026 Judgment of the Regional Court of Munich I (37 O 104/26))(Related document(s) 39 ) (Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 6/30/2026) (Entered: 06/30/2026)

entry.title: Entry #39 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: MOTION to Dismiss Plaintiffs Nicholas Farrell and Jeff Ganan's Complaints filed by LinkedIn Corporation. Motion to Dismiss Hearing set for 9/3/2026 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 03, 17th Floor. Responses due by 7/14/2026. Replies due by 7/21/2026. (Attachments: # 1 Declaration of Tyler Seymour ISO Defendant LinkedIn Corporation's Motion to Dismiss For Lack of Subject Matter Jurisdiction, # 2 Exhibit A - Human-LinkedIn Data Processing Agreement)(Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 6/30/2026) (Entered: 06/30/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-06-26 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Motion Hearing AND ~Util - Set Deadlines/Hearings

entry.title: Entry #37 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Transcript of Proceedings held on June 25, 2026, before Judge Vince Chhabria. Court Reporter Kendra Steppler, email at kendra_steppler@cand.uscourts.gov. Per General Order No. 59 and Judicial Conference policy, this transcript may be viewed only at the Clerk's Office public terminal or may be purchased through the Court Reporter until the deadline for the Release of Transcript Restriction. After that date, it may be obtained through PACER. Any Notice of Intent to Request Redaction, if required, is due no later than 5 business days from date of this filing. (Re 36 Transcript Order ) Release of Transcript Restriction set for 9/24/2026. (Related documents(s) 36 ) (Steppler, Kendra) (Filed on 6/26/2026) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #38 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Minute Entry for proceedings held before Judge Vince Chhabria: Motion Hearing held on 6/25/2026 re 26 MOTION to Consolidate Cases and Appoint Interim Class Counsel and Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of Motion filed by Nicholas Farrell. Oral arguments made and heard. 26 Motion to Consolidate Cases and Appoint Interim Class Counsel to remain pending until forthcoming Motion to Dismiss is adjudicated. Discovery stayed until 9/3/2026. Opposition briefs limited to 20 pages. LinkedIn may file a consolidated reply brief limited to 20 pages. Motions due 6/30/2026. Motion Hearing set for 9/3/2026 at 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 03, 17th Floor before Judge Vince Chhabria. Total Time in Court: 8 minutes. Court Reporter: Kendra Steppler. Plaintiff Attorney: Scott Drury (Farrell) J.R. Howell (Ganan). Defendant Attorney: Simona Agnolucci, Eduardo Santacana, Natalie Peelish. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (bxs, COURT STAFF) (Date Filed: 6/25/2026) (Entered: 06/26/2026)

entry.title: Entry #36 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: TRANSCRIPT ORDER for proceedings held on 06/25/2026 before Judge Vince Chhabria by LinkedIn Corporation, for Court Reporter Kendra Steppler. (Santacana, Eduardo) (Filed on 6/25/2026) (Entered: 06/25/2026)

entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #29 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: ORDER. In light of the upcoming motion to consolidate hearing, the case management conference scheduled for June 5 is vacated. The parties should be prepared to discuss scheduling at the hearing on the motion to consolidate. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 5/29/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/29/2026) (Entered: 05/29/2026)

entry.title: Entry #26 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: MOTION to Consolidate Cases and Appoint Interim Class Counsel and Memorandum of Points and Authorities in Support of Motion filed by Nicholas Farrell. Motion Hearing set for 6/25/2026 10:00 AM in San Francisco, Courtroom 04, 17th Floor before Judge Vince Chhabria. Responses due by 6/4/2026. Replies due by 6/11/2026. (Attachments: # 1 Declaration Scott R. Drury, # 2 Exhibit A (Drury Legal Firm Resume), # 3 Declaration Joshua D. Arisohn, # 4 Exhibit A. (Arisohn LLC Firm Resume), # 5 Proposed Order)(Drury, Scott) (Filed on 5/21/2026) (Entered: 05/21/2026)

entry.title: Entry #25 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Order by Judge Vince Chhabria granting 22 Motion for Pro Hac Vice as to Joshua Arisohn. (bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/20/2026) (Entered: 05/20/2026)

entry.title: Entry #24 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: CLERK'S NOTICE ADVANCING 7/10/2026 INITIAL CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE. Joint Case Management Statement due by 5/29/2026. Initial Case Management Conference set for 6/5/2026 at 10:00 AM by Videoconference Only. This proceeding will be held via a Zoom webinar.Webinar Access: All counsel, members of the public, and media may access the webinar information at https://www.cand.uscourts.gov/vc Court Appearances: Advanced notice is required of counsel or parties who wish to be identified by the court as making an appearance or will be participating in the argument at the hearing. One list of names of all counsel appearing for all parties must be sent in one email to the CRD at vccrd@cand.uscourts.gov no later than Friday, May 29, 2026, by no later than 12:00PM.Civ LR 77-3(d). Persons granted access to court proceedings held by telephone or videoconference are reminded that photographing, recording, and rebroadcasting of court proceedings, including screenshots or other visual copying of a hearing, is absolutely prohibited.Zoom Guidance and Setup: https://cand.uscourts.gov/zoom. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.)(bxs, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/19/2026) (Entered: 05/19/2026)

entry.title: Minute entry from 2026-05-04 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: Order

entry.title: Entry #18 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: ORDER. It appears that Linkedin has not filed a notice of its motion to relate on the docket of Ganan v. LinkedIn Corporation (26-cv-2968), pursuant to Rule 3-12(b). LinkedIn is ordered to file a notice of the motion on the Ganan docket by Monday, May 4, 2026. The plaintiff in the Ganan case has until Friday, May 8, 2026, to oppose the pending motion to relate, if it wishes to do so. Signed by Judge Vince Chhabria on 5/4/26. (This is a text-only entry generated by the court. There is no document associated with this entry.) (vclc2, COURT STAFF) (Filed on 5/4/2026) (Entered: 05/04/2026)

entry.title: Entry #17 in Farrell v. LinkedIn Corporation, 4:26-cv-02953
entry.summary: OPPOSITION/RESPONSE (re 16 ADMINISTRATIVE MOTION to Consider Whether Cases Should be Related ) filed byNicholas Farrell. (Attachments: # 1 Proposed Order)(Drury, Scott) (Filed on 5/1/2026) (Entered: 05/01/2026)
